message:
fix(dcg): code review improvements

- Add JSON.parse error handling in dcg-ru-integration.service.ts to prevent
  crashes on malformed plan JSON or validation errors
- Remove unused scanContent function (dead code)
- Remove unused drizzle-orm imports (and, gte, sql)
- Fix race condition in syncConfigFromPersistent using promise caching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
